triggers.prompt_regex: \b(remote doctor|service reliability|durable queue|lease|heartbeat|reaper|degraded dependency|multiuser|tenant quota|noisy neighbor|rate limit|healthcheck|readiness)\b

context.directive: Before treating the remote service as healthy, run the remote doctor and require structured async queue, dependency isolation, and tenant guard probes. Missing remote services should degrade explicitly; missing reliability probes should fail.
